description:
Track and evaluate the performance of your investment portfolio across stocks, cryptocurrencies, and other assets.


- Improvement: Enhanced Trade Republic CSV importer to reconcile cash dividend corrections and book negative tax optimizations as taxes.
- Improvement: Improved IBFlex cross-currency dividend import.
- Improvement: Enhanced PDF importers for Scalable Capital and Liberty Vorsorge AG.
- Improvement: Added a CSV import template for Scalable Capital.
- Improvement: Added a tooltip for the FIRE widget.
- Fix: Fixed the label background on Windows in the theme preferences page.
- Fix: Reverted “Remember and preset the transaction date last entered” due to issues.
